description_long: This is a modern suburban bungalow with a two-story structure, featuring a dark gable roof and a prominent attached garage at the front. The front yard is landscaped with green grass and a paved driveway leading to the garage, while the entryway is covered and flanked by windows. The rear of the house opens to a spacious backyard with a patio, outdoor seating, and a swimming pool, as well as a pergola or gazebo structure. Large windows are distributed across the facade, providing ample natural light to the interior. The exterior walls are finished in a light color, contrasting with the dark roof and driveway. The property is bordered by low fencing and includes both paved and grassy areas for recreation and relaxation.
description: A modern two-story bungalow with a dark gable roof, attached garage, landscaped front yard, and a backyard featuring a patio, pool, and pergola.
description_view_0: Front view showing the attached garage, main entrance, and landscaped driveway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, garage, and the backyard with pool and pergola.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the patio, outdoor seating, swimming pool, and open backyard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing windows, side yard, and the transition from front to back areas.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with grouped rear and side windows
